productDisplayName: Levis Kids Girl's Dana Pink Kidswear
description: CompositionPink round neck top made of 100% cotton, with front button panel, short sleeves with gathered sides, red embroidered Levi's branding on the chest and blue print combined with embroidery at the backFittingRegular15 cm Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water, colour will bleed Use mild detergent Dry cleaning possible Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Dry flat inside out in shade Iron at medium setting only Iron on reverse Wash before wearing Indulge your little one in happy feelings with this pink top from Levi's. The self coloured top leaves a lot to imagination and reflects the innocence of children. Team this with small white skirts and comfy crocs footwear for a happy, casual outing with her small buddies, while the pure cotton fabric stays soft on her skin and keeps her fresh and comfortable all day.
